mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_buddy (reader_id, preferred_slot, preferred_area, study_goal, status) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{preferredSlot}, #{preferredArea}, #{studyGoal}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE study_buddy SET preferred_slot = #{preferredSlot}, preferred_area = #{preferredArea}, study_goal = #{studyGoal}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE reader_id = #{readerId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, reader_id, preferred_slot, preferred_area, study_goal, status, create_time, update_time FROM study_buddy WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, reader_id, preferred_slot, preferred_area, study_goal, status, create_time, update_time FROM study_buddy WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
